verses.latin_vulgate: His itaque transactis, factus est sermo Domini ad Abram per visionem dicens : Noli timere, Abram : ego protector tuus sum, et merces tua magna nimis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַחַ֣ר ׀ הַדְּבָרִ֣ים הָאֵ֗לֶּה הָיָ֤ה דְבַר־יְהֹוָה֙ אֶל־אַבְרָ֔ם בַּֽמַּחֲזֶ֖ה לֵאמֹ֑ר אַל־תִּירָ֣א אַבְרָ֗ם אָנֹכִי֙ מָגֵ֣ן לָ֔ךְ שְׂכָרְךָ֖ הַרְבֵּ֥ה מְאֹֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now when these things were done, the word of the Lord came to Abram by a vision, saying: Fear not, Abram, I am thy protector, and thy reward exceeding great.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin nämä olivat niin tapahtuneet, tuli Herran sana Abramin tykö näyssä, sanoen: älä pelkää Abram, minä olen sinun kilpes, ja sangen suuri palkkas.
verses.king_james: After these things the word of the Lord came unto Abram in a vision, saying, Fear not, Abram: I am thy shield, and thy exceeding great reward.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Abram : Domine Deus, quid dabis mihi ? ego vadam absque liberis, et filius procuratoris domus meæ iste Damascus Eliezer.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אַבְרָ֗ם אֲדֹנָ֤י יֱהֹוִה֙ מַה־תִּתֶּן־לִ֔י וְאָנֹכִ֖י הוֹלֵ֣ךְ עֲרִירִ֑י וּבֶן־מֶ֣שֶׁק בֵּיתִ֔י ה֖וּא דַּמֶּ֥שֶׂק אֱלִיעֶֽזֶר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Abram said: Lord God, what wilt thou give me? I shall go without children: and the son of the steward of my house is this Damascus Eliezer.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Abram sanoi: Herra, Herra, mitäs minulle annat? minä lähden lapsetoinna täältä, ja minun huoneeni haltia on tämä Eleasari Damaskusta.
verses.king_james: And Abram said, Lord God, what wilt thou give me, seeing I go childless, and the steward of my house is this Eliezer of Damascus?

verses.latin_vulgate: Addiditque Abram : Mihi autem non dedisti semen, et ecce vernaculus meus, hæres meus erit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אַבְרָ֔ם הֵ֣ן לִ֔י לֹ֥א נָתַ֖תָּה זָ֑רַע וְהִנֵּ֥ה בֶן־בֵּיתִ֖י יוֹרֵ֥שׁ אֹתִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Abram added: But to me thou hast not given seed: and lo my servant born in my house, shall be my heir.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Abram taas sanoi: mutta minulle et sinä antanut siementä. Ja katsos, minun kotopalkolliseni tulee minun perillisekseni.
verses.king_james: And Abram said, Behold, to me thou hast given no seed: and, lo, one born in my house is mine heir.

verses.latin_vulgate: Statimque sermo Domini factus est ad eum, dicens : Non erit hic hæres tuus, sed qui egredietur de utero tuo, ipsum habebis hæredem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִנֵּ֨ה דְבַר־יְהֹוָ֤ה אֵלָיו֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר לֹ֥א יִֽירָשְׁךָ֖ זֶ֑ה כִּי־אִם֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר יֵצֵ֣א מִמֵּעֶ֔יךָ ה֖וּא יִֽירָשֶֽׁךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And immediately the word of the Lord came to him, saying : He shall not be thy heir: but he that shall come out of thy bowels, him shalt thou have for thy heir.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja katso, Herran sana tuli hänen tykönsä, sanoen: ei tämä sinua peri: vaan joka sinun ruumiistas tulee, se tulee sinun perillisekses.
verses.king_james: And, behold, the word of the Lord came unto him, saying, This shall not be thine heir; but he that shall come forth out of thine own bowels shall be thine heir.

verses.latin_vulgate: Eduxitque eum foras, et ait illi : Suspice cælum, et numera stellas, si potes. Et dixit ei : Sic erit semen tuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיּוֹצֵ֨א אֹת֜וֹ הַח֗וּצָה וַיֹּ֙אמֶר֙ הַבֶּט־נָ֣א הַשָּׁמַ֗יְמָה וּסְפֹר֙ הַכּ֣וֹכָבִ֔ים אִם־תּוּכַ֖ל לִסְפֹּ֣ר אֹתָ֑ם וַיֹּ֣אמֶר ל֔וֹ כֹּ֥ה יִהְיֶ֖ה זַרְעֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he brought him forth abroad, and said to him: Look up to heaven and number the stars if thou canst. And he said to him: So shall thy seed be.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin hän vei hänen ulos, ja sanoi: katso taivaaseen ja lue tähdet, jos sinä ne taidat lukea. Ja sanoi hänelle: niin sinun siemenes on oleva.
verses.king_james: And he brought him forth abroad, and said, Look now toward heaven, and tell the stars, if thou be able to number them: and he said unto him, So shall thy seed be.

verses.latin_vulgate: Credidit Abram Deo, et reputatum est illi ad justitiam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהֶאֱמִ֖ן בַּֽיהֹוָ֑ה וַיַּחְשְׁבֶ֥הָ לּ֖וֹ צְדָקָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Abram believed God, and it was reputed to him unto justice.
verses.finnish_biblia: (Abram) uskoi Herran, ja hän luki hänelle sen vanhurskaudeksi.
verses.king_james: And he believed in the Lord; and he counted it to him for righteousness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque ad eum : Ego Dominus qui eduxi te de Ur Chaldæorum ut darem tibi terram istam, et possideres eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֖אמֶר אֵלָ֑יו אֲנִ֣י יְהֹוָ֗ה אֲשֶׁ֤ר הוֹצֵאתִ֙יךָ֙ מֵא֣וּר כַּשְׂדִּ֔ים לָ֧תֶת לְךָ֛ אֶת־הָאָ֥רֶץ הַזֹּ֖את לְרִשְׁתָּֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said to him: I am the Lord who brought thee out from Ur of the Chaldees, to give thee this land, and that thou mightest possess it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sanoi hänelle: minä se Herra olen, joka vein sinun ulos Kaldean Uurista, antaakseni sinulle tämän maan omakses.
verses.king_james: And he said unto him, I am the Lord that brought thee out of Ur of the Chaldees, to give thee this land to inherit it.

verses.latin_vulgate: At ille ait : Domine Deus, unde scire possum quod possessurus sim eam ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּאמַ֑ר אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֔ה בַּמָּ֥ה אֵדַ֖ע כִּ֥י אִֽירָשֶֽׁנָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: But he said: Lord God, whereby may I know that I shall possess it?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän sanoi: Herra, Herra, mistä minä tietäisin sen omistavani?
verses.king_james: And he said, Lord God, whereby shall I know that I shall inherit it?

verses.latin_vulgate: Et respondens Dominus : Sume, inquit, mihi vaccam triennem, et capram trimam, et arietem annorum trium, turturem quoque et columbam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֵלָ֗יו קְחָ֥ה לִי֙ עֶגְלָ֣ה מְשֻׁלֶּ֔שֶׁת וְעֵ֥ז מְשֻׁלֶּ֖שֶׁת וְאַ֣יִל מְשֻׁלָּ֑שׁ וְתֹ֖ר וְגוֹזָֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord answered, and said: Take me a cow of three years old, and a she-goat of three years. and a ram of three years, a turtle also, and a pigeon.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän sanoi hänelle: ota minulle kolmivuotinen hehkonen, ja kolmivuotinen vuohi, ja kolmivuotinen oinas: niin myös mettinen, ja nuori kyhkyläinen.
verses.king_james: And he said unto him, Take me an heifer of three years old, and a she goat of three years old, and a ram of three years old, and a turtledove, and a young pigeon.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui tollens universa hæc, divisit ea per medium, et utrasque partes contra se altrinsecus posuit ; aves autem non divisit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּֽקַּֽח־ל֣וֹ אֶת־כׇּל־אֵ֗לֶּה וַיְבַתֵּ֤ר אֹתָם֙ בַּתָּ֔וֶךְ וַיִּתֵּ֥ן אִישׁ־בִּתְר֖וֹ לִקְרַ֣את רֵעֵ֑הוּ וְאֶת־הַצִּפֹּ֖ר לֹ֥א בָתָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he took all these, and divided them in the midst, and laid the two pieces of each one against the other: but the birds he divided not.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän otti hänelle nämät kaikki, ja jakoi keskeltä kahtia, ja pani itsekunkin osan toinen toisensa kohdalle; vaan lintuja ei hän jakanut.
verses.king_james: And he took unto him all these, and divided them in the midst, and laid each piece one against another: but the birds divided he not.

verses.latin_vulgate: Descenderuntque volucres super cadavera, et abigebat eas Abram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֥רֶד הָעַ֖יִט עַל־הַפְּגָרִ֑ים וַיַּשֵּׁ֥ב אֹתָ֖ם אַבְרָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the fowls came down upon the carcasses, and Abram drove them away.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin linnut tulivat lihain päälle; ja Abram karkotti ne.
verses.king_james: And when the fowls came down upon the carcases, Abram drove them away.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque sol occumberet, sopor irruit super Abram, et horror magnus et tenebrosus invasit eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֤י הַשֶּׁ֙מֶשׁ֙ לָב֔וֹא וְתַרְדֵּמָ֖ה נָפְלָ֣ה עַל־אַבְרָ֑ם וְהִנֵּ֥ה אֵימָ֛ה חֲשֵׁכָ֥ה גְדֹלָ֖ה נֹפֶ֥לֶת עָלָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when the sun was setting, a deep sleep fell upon Abram, and a great and darksome horror seized upon him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tapahtui auringon laskeissa, että raskas uni lankesi Abramin päälle: ja katso, hämmästys ja synkkä pimeys tuli hänen päällensä.
verses.king_james: And when the sun was going down, a deep sleep fell upon Abram; and, lo, an horror of great darkness fell upon him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dictumque est ad eum : Scito prænoscens quod peregrinum futurum sit semen tuum in terra non sua, et subjicient eos servituti, et affligent quadringentis annis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר לְאַבְרָ֗ם יָדֹ֨עַ תֵּדַ֜ע כִּי־גֵ֣ר ׀ יִהְיֶ֣ה זַרְעֲךָ֗ בְּאֶ֙רֶץ֙ לֹ֣א לָהֶ֔ם וַעֲבָד֖וּם וְעִנּ֣וּ אֹתָ֑ם אַרְבַּ֥ע מֵא֖וֹת שָׁנָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it was said unto him: Know thou beforehand that thy seed shall be a stranger in a land not their own, and they shall bring them under bondage, and afflict them four hundred years.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin hän sanoi Abramille: sinun pitää totisesti tietämän, että sinun siemenes tulee muukalaiseksi sille maalle, joka ei heidän omansa ole, ja he saattavat heitä orjaksi, ja vaivaavat heitä neljäsataa ajastaikaa.
verses.king_james: And he said unto Abram, Know of a surety that thy seed shall be a stranger in a land that is not theirs, and shall serve them; and they shall afflict them four hundred years;

verses.latin_vulgate: Verumtamen gentem, cui servituri sunt, ego judicabo : et post hæc egredientur cum magna substantia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגַ֧ם אֶת־הַגּ֛וֹי אֲשֶׁ֥ר יַעֲבֹ֖דוּ דָּ֣ן אָנֹ֑כִי וְאַחֲרֵי־כֵ֥ן יֵצְא֖וּ בִּרְכֻ֥שׁ גָּדֽוֹל׃
verses.douay_rheims: But I will judge the nation which they shall serve, and after this they shall come out with great substance.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta sille kansalle, jonka orjana he ovat, kostan minä: ja sitte he lähtevät ulos suurella tavaralla.
verses.king_james: And also that nation, whom they shall serve, will I judge: and afterward shall they come out with great substance.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu autem ibis ad patres tuos in pace, sepultus in senectute bona.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֛ה תָּב֥וֹא אֶל־אֲבֹתֶ֖יךָ בְּשָׁל֑וֹם תִּקָּבֵ֖ר בְּשֵׂיבָ֥ה טוֹבָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And thou shalt go to thy fathers in peace, and be buried in a good old age.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sinä menet isäis tykö rauhassa, ja haudataan hyvässä ijässä.
verses.king_james: And thou shalt go to thy fathers in peace; thou shalt be buried in a good old age.

verses.latin_vulgate: Generatione autem quarta revertentur huc : necdum enim completæ sunt iniquitates Amorrhæorum usque ad præsens tempus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְד֥וֹר רְבִיעִ֖י יָשׁ֣וּבוּ הֵ֑נָּה כִּ֧י לֹא־שָׁלֵ֛ם עֲוֺ֥ן הָאֱמֹרִ֖י עַד־הֵֽנָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: But in the fourth generation they shall return hither: for as yet the iniquities of the Amorrhites are not at the full until this present time.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan neljännessä miespolvessa he tänne palajavat: sillä Amorilaisten pahuus ei ole vielä täytetty.
verses.king_james: But in the fourth generation they shall come hither again: for the iniquity of the Amorites is not yet full.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cum ergo occubuisset sol, facta est caligo tenebrosa, et apparuit clibanus fumans, et lampas ignis transiens inter divisiones illas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֤י הַשֶּׁ֙מֶשׁ֙ בָּ֔אָה וַעֲלָטָ֖ה הָיָ֑ה וְהִנֵּ֨ה תַנּ֤וּר עָשָׁן֙ וְלַפִּ֣יד אֵ֔שׁ אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָבַ֔ר בֵּ֖ין הַגְּזָרִ֥ים הָאֵֽלֶּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when the sun was set, there arose a dark mist, and there appeared a smoking furnace, and a lamp of fire passing between those divisions.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja koska aurinko oli laskenut, ja pimeys joutunut: katso, pätsi suitsi, ja liekki kävi kappaleitten keskeltä.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, that, when the sun went down, and it was dark, behold a smoking furnace, and a burning lamp that passed between those pieces.

verses.latin_vulgate: In illo die pepigit Dominus fœdus cum Abram, dicens : Semini tuo dabo terram hanc a fluvio Ægypti usque ad fluvium magnum Euphraten,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֗וּא כָּרַ֧ת יְהֹוָ֛ה אֶת־אַבְרָ֖ם בְּרִ֣ית לֵאמֹ֑ר לְזַרְעֲךָ֗ נָתַ֙תִּי֙ אֶת־הָאָ֣רֶץ הַזֹּ֔את מִנְּהַ֣ר מִצְרַ֔יִם עַד־הַנָּהָ֥ר הַגָּדֹ֖ל נְהַר־פְּרָֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: That day God made a covenant with Abram, saying: To thy seed will I give this land, from the river to Egypt even to the great river Euphrates.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä päivänä teki Herra liiton Abramin kanssa, sanoen: sinun siemenelles annan minä tämän maan, hamasta Egyptin virrasta, niin suureen virtaan Phratiin asti.
verses.king_james: In the same day the Lord made a covenant with Abram, saying, Unto thy seed have I given this land, from the river of Egypt unto the great river, the river Euphrates:

verses.latin_vulgate: Cinæos, et Cenezæos, Cedmonæos,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶת־הַקֵּינִי֙ וְאֶת־הַקְּנִזִּ֔י וְאֵ֖ת הַקַּדְמֹנִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Cineans, and Cenezites, the Cedmonites,
verses.finnish_biblia: Keniläiset, ja Kenitsiläiset, ja Kadmonilaiset,
verses.king_james: The Kenites, and the Kenizzites, and the Kadmonites,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Hethæos, et Pherezæos, Raphaim quoque,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הַחִתִּ֥י וְאֶת־הַפְּרִזִּ֖י וְאֶת־הָרְפָאִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Hethites, and the Pherezites, the Raphaim also,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Hetiläiset, ja Pheresiläiset, ja Kalevan pojat,
verses.king_james: And the Hittites, and the Perizzites, and the Rephaims,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Amorrhæos, et Chananæos, et Gergesæos, et Jebusæos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הָֽאֱמֹרִי֙ וְאֶת־הַֽכְּנַעֲנִ֔י וְאֶת־הַגִּרְגָּשִׁ֖י וְאֶת־הַיְבוּסִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the Amorrhites, and the Chanaanites, and the Gergesites, and the Jebusites.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Amorilaiset, ja Kanaanealaiset, ja Gergesiläiset, ja Jebusilaiset.
verses.king_james: And the Amorites, and the Canaanites, and the Girgashites, and the Jebusites.
